transcript: Speaker A: Good morning all. Today I am to speak on topic Thermodynamics. Speaker B: Bhai... tu English me itna fluent kabse ho gaya? tu to water ko bhi vattarr vattarr bolta tha pahile [Brother... since when did you become so fluent in English? You used to say 'vattarr' for water before.] Speaker A: AI bro... SpeakX ki AI app se bas roz 15 minute practice kari aur level up [AI bro... just practiced 15 minutes daily with SpeakX's AI app and leveled up.] Speaker B: sach bhai jhoot to nahi bol raha [Really brother, you're not lying?] Speaker A: bilkul such. speakX main games hai, challenges hai... bilkul boring nahi hai. aur koi galati karte bhi ho, AI teacher humein turant feedback dekar correct kar dega. Fluency, pronunciation... sab improve! [Absolutely true. SpeakX has games, challenges... it's not boring at all. And even if you make a mistake, the AI teacher will immediately give feedback and correct you. Fluency, pronunciation... everything improves!] Speaker B: bro.. mujhe bhi to sikha na [Bro... teach me too.] Speaker A: bhai.. Speak X AI app khud download karo aur sikh ja [Brother... download the SpeakX AI app yourself and learn.]
on_screen_text: today I am to speak on topic, Bhai... tu English me itna fluent kabse ho gaya?, tu to water ko bhi vattarr vattarr bolta tha pahile, AI bro.., SpeakX.ai, Set your daily practice goal, sach bhai jhoot to nahi bol raha, bilkul such, speakX main games hai, challenges hai..., bilkul boring nahi hai, aur koi galati karte bhi ho, AI teacher humein turant feedback dekar correct kar dega, Fluency, pronunciation... sab improve!, bro.. mujhe bhi to sikha na, bhai.., Speak X AI app khud download karo aur sikh ja
summary: A young man surprises his friend with his fluent English, attributing his progress to practicing 15 minutes daily on the SpeakX AI app. The app features interactive games and instant AI feedback to correct pronunciation and grammar. He advises his friend to download the app to start learning.
